intentSynonyms: show me my audit events in netlify
view my audit events in netlify
see all my audit events in netlify
list account audit log events in netlify
description: List audit log events for a Netlify account. Returns actions performed by team members such as site creation, deploy locks, and settings changes. Supports text search and pagination.

account_id.description: The account ID to query audit events for

query.description: Text search query to filter events
